description: Cross-locale Germanic/Nordic data audit for Mojito MF2 native inflection planning.

locales.description: Generator-side audit for Unicode Inflection data before choosing an MF2 runtime pack family.

packPolicy.reason: Danish data has broad nominative/genitive, number, common/neuter gender, and definite/indefinite coverage; runtime should validate explicit product terms before trying article or suffix composition.

locales.description: Generator-side audit for Unicode Inflection data before choosing an MF2 runtime pack family.

packPolicy.reason: Norwegian Bokmål has useful masculine/feminine/neuter, singular/plural, and definite/indefinite data, but almost no noun case coverage.

locales.description: Generator-side audit for Unicode Inflection data before choosing an MF2 runtime pack family.

packPolicy.reason: Dutch data is much smaller, noun case and definiteness are sparse, and the interesting dictionary signal is gender/number plus diminutive metadata.

locales.description: Generator-side audit for Unicode Inflection data before choosing an MF2 runtime pack family.

packPolicy.reason: Swedish data has broad nominative/genitive, common/neuter, singular/plural, and definite/indefinite coverage; it resembles Danish more than the no-case Bokmål path.
